## Research: TBML Typologies

Found 3 primary typologies documented by FATF:
1. Over/under-invoicing of goods and services
2. Multiple invoicing for the same goods
3. Falsely described goods and services

Key finding: FATF 2006 report remains the canonical reference, updated in 2020 with digital commerce patterns.

## Sources Consulted
- https://www.fatf-gafi.org/publications/methodsandtrends/documents/trade-basedmoneylaundering.html
- https://www.fatf-gafi.org/content/fatf-gafi/en/publications/Methodsandtrends/Trade-based-money-laundering-trends-and-developments.html
